reviews.name: places/ChIJz3cHNjKxt4kRoS2xRs9xv60/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRd2FlRFV3EAE
reviews.text:
I am pleased to highly recommend Dr. Sisu as a medical professional. She is an intuitive and deeply knowledgeable doctor who takes the time to listen carefully to her patients. Dr. Sisu's approach is not to jump immediately to Western medicine but to work collaboratively with you to find a healthier, gentler solution to your ailments.

What stands out most about Dr. Sisu is her laser-focus on what’s truly going on with you, both physically and emotionally, which sets her apart from many practitioners. Her compassionate and kind nature further enhances the experience, making you feel genuinely cared for and heard.

I feel incredibly fortunate to have been referred to Dr. Sisu, as her practice has been one of the best-kept secrets, and I can honestly say I’ve never had such a positive experience with any other healthcare provider. If you're looking for a thoughtful, holistic, and personalized approach to your health, I highly recommend Dr. Sisu.

reviews.name: places/ChIJz3cHNjKxt4kRoS2xRs9xv60/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGR2FESlZWSGhRU0ZCeU1scHRVSFpLWTJ4Zk5FRRAB
reviews.text: I am so thankful for Dr. Sisu and her knowledge and expertise. I have experienced tremendous health improvement in the short time I have been under her care. Thank you Anca!

reviews.name: places/ChIJz3cHNjKxt4kRoS2xRs9xv60/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNxc3ZMVFdBEAE
reviews.text: A friend recommended me to see Dr. Sisu. I had never visited a functional doctor before, so I didn't know what to expect. At the time, I was seeing many doctors that were assessing a potential autoimmune disorder. Dr. Sisu took the time to get to know me, as a whole person. She doesn't look at one particular area, but looks at you as a whole. She asked me questions about my sleep, my posture when working, what I ate, what I drank, what supplements I took, and so forth. She ran some very revealing tests and after seeing her for about 6 months now, I am a TOTAL different person. I have asthma and haven't needed my inhaler since I started making all these changes! I embarked in a journey of well-being, I got better ONLY with supplements and better diet. She went to the bottom of what was going on and we discovered that some foods that were supposedly healthy were not necessarily good for me in particular (who knew?). Dr. Sisu is a real partner in health, and she truly CARES about her patients. She is not rushing for you to leave and devotes her time and energy to listen to you and the cues your body gives. Since I started seeing her and implementing her recommendations, my levels of energy went completely up, I am a happier, more energetic, less stressed person thanks to her. I don't suffer any more pains that would come "out of nowhere". I truly recommend Dr. Sisu to anyone that is committed to a lifetime of well-being and wants to make a real change in life!

“Consistent, compassionate care that’s made a lasting difference.”

I’ve been seeing Dr. Louis Ziegler at Advanced Health Center in Arlington since 2011 for back injuries, and he’s been outstanding. He listens, explains everything clearly, and truly cares about his patients.

Over the years I’ve also received care from another trusted chiropractor who once worked here, and I’m grateful for everything I learned from both. Dr. Ziegler’s steady professionalism and holistic approach have helped me stay healthy and active.

Highly recommend to anyone looking for thoughtful, patient-centered chiropractic care.

reviews.text: Dr. Z is amazing!  I was barely able to walk or sleep at the start of this week due to a lower back injury, and am already standing upright again after 3 sessions.  I am also sleeping soundly again!  The highly-concentrated Turmeric he recommended is working wonders as well.  He is a kind and compassionate physician that knows a TON about all-natural supplements, which I really appreciate.  I 100% recommend him to anyone in need!

reviews.name: places/ChIJB-KT-6C2t4kRWI0bhLeTGqY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tWamNIRldkVTFpYUhOZlJpMUxNV3h6WmxKMmRsRRAB
reviews.text: Dr. Ziegler and his staff are amazing. He has helped alleviate numerous sports injuries over the years through acupuncture treatments. In addition to addressing the acute injuries, his acupuncture methods are calming and soothing. I highly recommend him.

reviews.name: places/ChIJB-KT-6C2t4kRWI0bhLeTGqY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2kweWRETnJiMUJZY2xack5rUnpaR1pSU25WU1IxRRAB
reviews.text: I saw Dr. Chang for an acupuncture treatment when I had an ongoing lower back pain for 2 weeks. I have done 3 physical therapy sessions prior to that, along with 1 thai massage, 1 chiropractic session, and daily stretching/ mobility exercises, and I always felt like something in my back felt ‘collapsed’, like spinal discs/ tissue got shorter and I constantly wanted to stretch one side of my lower back, open up a space there. So after 1 acupuncture session I felt a noticeable difference where it helped space out something in my back and I felt I was walking straight and tall again, without a need of wearing a tight back brace. I was pleasantly surprised to see the positive effect just after 1 session. I went to a 2nd session one week later for maintenance purpose. I’m fixed now, and I will say of course it’s better to try various healing practices combined in your recovery program, and acupuncture is definitely one of the effective tools.

reviews.name: places/ChIJB-KT-6C2t4kRWI0bhLeTGqY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xOZk5YVklhMjlCZFdsd1lsWkNOMnRsVW1adFkzYxAB
reviews.text: Dr. Ziegler has been amazing! After only a handful of sessions, I’m starting to feel confident my back issues can be resolved long term without needing surgery. I appreciate that he genuinely seems to care about getting me back into shape. I’m starting to feel balance in my body shifting back to a place that I haven’t felt since I was a teenager. I find his knowledge and recommendations to be highly valuable. This was missing in other conventional practices which had not worked for me prior. Thank you! 🙏

reviews.text:
Im writing this review because I did not understand what I was getting into when I contacted Dr. T. I am 49 years old. I have a young wife and I am used to feeling awesome. I'm used to being awesome. My sister is a doctor so I feel like I understand things more than I actually do, as being related does not transfer knowledge.
So You are feeling the way I did and want to change things. Let me explain somethings... Dr. T. has a wife that is a bit harsh. I have had a few arguments with her. She is actually in love with her husband and defends him when she should have better human interactive skills. This post is not about her. It's about you. It's also about me.
I found a genius who is passionate about helping people be the best they can. I had a bad experience with his wife and looked at the reviews. I was flooded with reviews that were bad. I was feeling justified. I wanted to attack Dr. T. but something held me back. He actually cares. He is brilliant. He has helped me. He charges less than most other doctors.
Most important. I feel like myself again.
Dr T. is a genius. He is not a good business man, yet he is a good man and my doctor. If you have any questions you would like to ask me personally please call Dr. T and he will give you my cell number.\ Rich Conant.

reviews.text:
I have been going to Nava for a few years now. The customer  Service experience with Nava. It is truly a feeling of being just a number. Every appointment I’ve had previously with lab work has been detailed and we went through step-by-step. Sam by the way is phenomenal! My last doctors experience Left Me feeling so frustrated I felt I had to write this review. I had a scheduled appointment. I took off work early and kept receiving back-to-back phone calls. Come to find out it was from the doctor. Who wanted to go ahead and get the appointment over with. To a point that he did not go through each results as I have done previously in all my There at Nava. When I finally answered the phone because I was commuting, he proceeded to say hey are you available right now so we can go ahead Proceed with the call. I felt like OK sure you’ve been blowing up my phone. A few months back, I reached out to Management regarding the Nava RX . I should say the lack of information. The information I was receiving Was very vague. And I wasn’t sure if there was an update in the program and what it entailed, etc.. I reached out to management, but no one ever returned my call. You’re forced to leave a message on a voicemail. Very impersonal.I paid $1,000 for the Nava RX program and didn’t receive the necessary documents until months later. The dosage was confusing. The information provided about different services is very limited, and frequent appointment cancellations make the process even more frustrating. One time I was in the parking lot as my appointment was rescheduled.

Things were much better before Nava went public. While I love the hormone treatment, I’m starting to question whether I can get a more well-rounded experience elsewhere.”

reviews.name: places/ChIJbU3_cbI_tokRGCfsTY0Kcj0/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURRNG9qUlp3EAE
reviews.text:
This is a long one, so hang in there with me. If you are made of money, ignore my review. From a health improvement perspective, me and my husband would highly recommend NAVA. Our energy, focus, sex drive and overall mood drastically improved (all reasons we seeked them out in the first place). We were both 28 and relatively healthy but needed that extra “umph”. We went to NAVA for about 8 months in 2024. My negative review is purely from a billing/financial perspective.

In order to gain access to NAVA, you are required to pay a monthly or annual subscription ($50+/mo). Appointments start out (for us) weekly to biweekly then every 3-4wks. Some in person, some virtual. We have great insurance that NAVA accepts (more on this later). We paid a copay at each appt ($15-25). Invoices are pages long for visits totaling 5min for lab work to 30-45min for consultations. Medications/supplements recommended to us were several hundred dollars per month. We found several supplements online for cheaper but we both took medication from a compounding company that was $300-400 for a 3 month supply. We are still receiving invoices from 6+ months ago for $15-200 each, after insurance. A card is required to be kept on file and is automatically billed the day the invoice is uploaded to the portal, leaving no time to budget for unexpected expenses (again, from 6+ months ago). When we called to ask if invoices can be mailed to us, you must pay to have each invoice sent individually.

To summarize $$$: we paid a monthly subscription ($50 each/month), copay each visit ($15-25), about $150-200/mo in supplements, $300 for an ointment every 3 months and $400 for prescription every 3 months, plus invoices from almost every appointment that weren’t covered by insurance ($15-200 each).

Again, if money is no object, I highly recommend NAVA. If you are a normal human, save your money — go to your primary care doctor to run basic testing, clean up your diet and work out.

reviews.text:
I have been using Optimal Bio hormone replacement therapy for years now.  They also helped me with my hypothyroidism as well.  They use all natural products and helped bring my body back to a more normal level of function.

After 5 children I was so tired all the time as I hit 50 and needed help.  Optimal Bio was a life saver and changer.  Carbs, especially sugar are your enemy ladies.  Eating healthy and being sure your VitD levels are okay is a must, but there is so much more available to get through the hormone shifts as you age.
I also take progesterone daily, along with my estridol and testosterone pellets every 4 months.
My thyroid med is amour thyroid but NP thyroid is also good and cheaper.

Do yourself a favor and check Optimal Bio out?  Insurance does not cover the pelleting, but setting aside a few dollars each month will get you feeling so much better. Cutting out any sugary coffees can save a few bucks too and help you lose weight in the process.

I can't leave without adding that some regular type of exercise is important as well especially as we age.  We need cardio and weight resistance for our heart and bones.

There is a good healthy life after 50, kids and menopause.

Christian Davis is extremely friendly, easy to talk to and share information with.  She listens well and is extremely knowledgeable.  I enjoy my visits to her office very much!!!!

reviews.text:
NOVA Concierge Medicine & Aesthetics is hands down the best medical spa experience in Northern Virginia. From the moment you walk in, you can tell this is not a typical medspa, it is truly physician-led, science-driven, and patient-focused. Dr. Zaidi takes the time to understand your health, skin, and long-term goals rather than pushing quick fixes. The level of medical knowledge, precision, and attention to detail is unmatched.

Their services range from advanced laser treatments, to injectables, IV therapy, hair restoration, and wellness-based aesthetic care. What sets this practice apart is how everything is grounded in physiology, nutrition, hormones, collagen remodeling, and healing are all considered, not ignored. Results look natural, refined, and actually improve over time.

The staff is warm, professional, and incredibly thorough, and the office itself is clean, modern, and calming. You never feel rushed, upsold, or treated like a number. If you’re looking for a top-tier medical spa in Fairfax / Northern Virginia that combines concierge medicine with advanced aesthetics and real medical expertise, this is the place. I wouldn’t trust my face, skin, or health to anyone else.

Highly recommend to anyone seeking safe, ethical, and results-driven aesthetic.

reviews.name: places/ChIJh1nZ9bi3t4kRkTFI5tW237g/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxcGFURlFPV3QwYTA1M2RrbEJhWEl6T1hkRVEzYxAB
reviews.text:
STAY AWAY if you are dealing with chronic health issues. You will be exploited.I spent over $5,000 here with no relief. I came to Nava in December 2024 extremely sick with gut issues, inflammation, and possible autoimmune concerns. I stayed until August 2025 and even after that had to request they stop charging me. Overall my experience was poor testing, minimal clinical insight, poor communication, and ongoing billing issues. It added stress to an already serious health situation.

The gut health program was expensive and NOT worth it. It's literally a scam. Please save your money. I went to a  second provider and they later told me Nava’s GI test is not comprehensive and missed key issues they identified at a lower cost.

The $199 monthly membership lacked transparency. I still spent hundreds to over $1,000 on supplements, was charged when not receiving services, and was billed after requesting cancellation. Additionally, it was hard to even take advantage of the monthly membership because most of the services were not even available in Fairfax or the machines were broken. I tried to cancel my membership a few times and it was difficult. Nearly every interaction felt like an upsell.

There was no true root cause approach. Testing was limited, key markers were missed, and there was no deep investigation into gut, immune, or inflammatory issues. It seemed like a scam, imagine having 2 meetings only with a gut practitioner/ nutritionist who barely told me anything other than to buy supplements from NAVA to fix my issues.

Support and communication were poor. Follow ups were inconsistent, I never received a promised doctor’s note, and no one addressed my concerns.
Billing was disorganized with incorrect charges, a switch from insurance to self pay mid treatment, and repeated issues canceling my membership.

I also struggled to get prescription support and  was idk I need to come in for an appointment even though this prescription was simply to manage pain, and never needed labs. They refused to prescribe it, a that's when I left. It is not a safe place for people with chronic issues or pain.  You can find much better care, and actual root-cause diagnoses at a fraction of the cost if you do your research.

The only decent experience was a PRX treatment, but overall this felt more like a med spa than a medical clinic. I came here very sick and left with no answers, more stress, and significant financial loss.

This may work for basic wellness or aesthetics, but not for complex or chronic conditions. If you want real functional medicine or root cause care, go elsewhere.

reviews.text: REALLY DISAPPOINTING!!! Over the phone we kind of went over the types of combinations massage she will likely get and pretty much that the massage therapist will kind of go over the best approach with her after they speak. We were told to arrive at least 10 minutes before so she can discuss about what’s going on and everything with her massage therapist, she arrived 30 minutes ahead got checked in and got a massage. no questions, no consult, just a regular massage and to use epson salt cause her body was tense, wasn’t expecting a miracle but didn’t think it would be this much of a waist either. I called immediately that day and then again a few days later but although it was a priority never heard back so I’m assuming our complaint was obviously not a priority.

reviews.text:
Gameday Men’s Health in Gainesville is the real deal  hands down the best decision I’ve made for myself in years.
From the moment you walk in, it feels like a high-end man cave: big leather chairs, multiple TVs, cold drinks, and snacks waiting for you. No sterile waiting room vibes here  it’s built for guys who actually want to take care of themselves without the awkwardness.
I started coming in for low energy and just not feeling like “me” anymore. The process was ridiculously easy: free consultation, same-day bloodwork, and quick, honest results. They confirmed my testosterone was tanking and got me on a custom plan. Within a few weeks I had my drive back  in the gym, at work, and everywhere else that matters.
What keeps me coming back every week, though, are Kiara and Kailey. These two are absolute superstars. They greet you by name, remember exactly how you like things, keep the place running like clockwork, and somehow still make time to joke around and check in on how you’re really doing. Kiara and Kailey are always great to see — they make the whole experience feel like hanging out with friends who genuinely want you to win.
If you’re a guy in the Gainesville area dragging through the day or just ready to feel like you did ten years ago, do yourself a favor and get in here. Gameday isn’t just a clinic — it gave me my edge back.

reviews.text: I can’t say enough great things about Game Day Men’s Health! From the moment I walked in, Kailey, Mahima, and Kiara made me feel comfortable and taken care of. Their friendliness and attention to detail really set them apart—it never feels rushed, and they genuinely care about your health and results. reviews.name: places/ChIJp5ZqLx9ntokRAJdDnhrBxdQ/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT201dVNGbGFkVEJrYmxoalpHaHVXVzVSUlZkWVZtYxAB
reviews.text:
I was one of those guys who bought into the stigmas associated with TRT: 'Roid rage, only for much older men, associated with heart problems, and the social stigma of being viewed as weak for seeking help in this situation. I went as far as believing that TRT and steroids were essentially one and the same. After getting my levels checked and my PCM seemingly not interested in treating my low T, I decided to enlist Google for alternative options. I landed on Gameday Men's Health and could not be more pleased with this decision. Kailey, Kiara, and the staff at Gameday Men's Health remove any stigma from TRT the moment you walk in the door. The atmosphere is modern, highly energetic, and for the better, lacks anything resembling a dull medical facility. The service from Kailey and Kiara, start to finish, is personalized and not at one moment did I feel like a number on a chart. Once I completed the initial entry with the ever so upbeat and bubbly Kiara, Kailey, with all of her charm and positivity, makes the most humbling portion of the visit (the injection) feel like a walk in the park. I look forward to my future appointments with Kailey at Gameday Men's Health.

One Month Update (21JAN2026): During my drive to the clinic for my 4th appointment with Kiara, I could not fathom that after a simply 4-week regimen I would see and feel the results as prominently as I do. I could not contain my excitement when I asked Kiara if the vast majority of men see the same results that I was experiencing from TRT. I explained to Kiara that my energy levels are noticeably, borderline drastically, improved. She explained that many men see improvements at this stage and some are experiencing even greater increases in their energy levels. And gents, when I say “energy,” I don’t mean just the energy to get through the day. ED affects over 10% of us who are in their 30’s and 50% of us who are in our 40’s. I can confidently tell you that I noticed a change in virility as well.

reviews.text: Many women don't know that GameDay MEN'S Health also treats women, but I assure you they do! My husband is seen at GameDay as well, and because of his amazing experience, I decided to give them a try too. They don't offer HRT, but they do offer different options to get women feeling like their best selves! I was stuck in a rut - gaining weight, fatigue, hair loss - and every doctor I went to couldn't find a reason. It wasn't my thyroid, it's not perimenopause and it wasn't diabetes or pre-diabetes (my A1C was perfect). I scheduled a consult and have met with Kayla and Haley, and discussed how I was feeling and what my options were. I initially wasn't interested in GLP-1 treatment, so we settled on a peptide treatment (Ipamorelin). Let. Me. Tell. You! Within just a few short weeks, I was feeling amazing. My skin was clearer, I was sleeping all night, I started losing weight and my hair stopped falling out! I felt amazing. They checked in with me every step of the way, and made me super comfortable with being seen in a clinic that on the outside looks to be for men only. My husband has had similar amazing experiences. They were supportive and checked on him and quickly provided all lab results and notes through email when he went through a medical event. I highly recommend GameDay for both men and women!

reviews.name: places/ChIJP5F8BJ5rsYkR6mdPGbGUmh8/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21rNVNuSk9jVzFvZUhWaWQzZFVUbXRzZUY5TGRrRRAB
reviews.text:
I recently had an appointment at the Men’s Wellness Center and wanted to share my experience in a clear, factual way for other men who are researching their options.

First, the positives:
After my visit, the clinic reached out to me directly to discuss my concerns. They acknowledged that my experience did not reflect the level of care they aim for and expressed disappointment that things weren’t handled better. I appreciated the follow-up and the professionalism of the phone call. They also followed through by calling me with my estrogen lab result the next day.

My concerns:
During my appointment, I felt that some of the more specialized concerns I raised—such as issues related to LH suppression and interest in treatments like HCG—were not addressed. The focus stayed mainly on testosterone and estrogen blockers, which may be ideal for some patients, but was not the level of individualized treatment approach I was hoping for.

The biggest surprise was the pricing structure. Before the visit I was told to expect a cost around $150–$250 per month, but the actual offer was a year-long program paid entirely upfront, totaling around $2,900 (and higher if additional treatments are included). This wasn’t mentioned beforehand, and it’s something I think future patients should be aware of.

Final thoughts:
What they offer may be a good fit for some men, especially those looking for a structured, all-in-one TRT program. The team was polite, and they did follow up after my visit to address my concerns.

However, due to the upfront cost and because my specific goals weren’t fully explored during the appointment, I decided to look into other treatment options. There are multiple avenues for men seeking hormone therapy, so it’s worth comparing different models before committing to a full-year package.

I hope this review helps others make an informed decision.

⭐ 5-Star Review for Game Day (Hampton, VA) ⭐

I want to give a big shout-out to Ashanti and Pachenze, the medical assistants at Game Day in Hampton, Virginia. These two ladies were absolutely amazing — funny, sweet, and incredibly professional. They knew their job inside and out and handled everything with confidence and care.

From the moment I walked in, they made me feel completely comfortable. They offered me candy and water, took the time to explain everything, and genuinely cared about how I was feeling. Their kindness, patience, and professionalism really stood out — you can tell they love what they do and take pride in it.

Women like Ashanti and Pachenze don’t get enough credit for the hard work they do every day, so I just want to say thank you for making my experience such a positive one. You both deserve every bit of recognition and appreciation.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ — Excellent service and amazing staff!

I’ve been receiving TRT treatments at Ageless Men’s Health in Herndon, VA for a little over a year, and I couldn’t be more pleased with both the results and the overall experience. The entire staff is extremely professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely friendly. They consistently monitor my bloodwork and take the time to ask the right questions to make sure everything is going well and that my testosterone levels stay in the ideal range. I never feel rushed or overlooked.

I highly recommend Ageless Men’s Health to anyone considering TRT. They’ve exceeded my expectations in every way.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVQf0XVkXtokROc27zICwDzE/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuMTdpVUtnEAE
reviews.text:
When I turned 40, I was determined to make it an amazing year. But I hadn’t been feeling 100 percent. In the last one to two years, I put on more weight than I’d like to admit and was definitely going through some changes that I couldn’t quite understand.

After numerous doctor visits and looking into different options, I discovered BeBalanced in Leesburg, which I will FOREVER swear by if you’re looking to fight and get rid of those perimenopausal threats.

Gone are the hot flashes, sleepless nights, mood swings, and excess weight. I’ve dropped 42 pounds since I committed to the all natural program in mid-May.

Four months later, their team continues to make sure I stay on track and maintain my weight and symptoms by taking the right supplements, eating healthy, keeping stress to a limit through meditation, dry brushing to release bad toxins from the skin, and a few other things to help keep my body clean and healthy.

Seriously, I can’t say enough about this journey. Thank you Yovanna and Jan. I will be forever grateful that I found you and will always recommend BeBalanced to anyone who’s struggling.

Pics show a four month difference…May 2024 versus now.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVQf0XVkXtokROc27zICwDzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNMdU1IaDZnRRAB
reviews.text:
I put off calling BeBalanced for about 2 months after first hearing about the program. When the results of my most recent physical showed that I had better do something about my gut issues, food reactions, high cholesterol and weight gain (30+pounds since menopause hit), I decided to seriously look into the program, costs and the stated and actual results clients experienced.
My weight, fatigue, bloating, tummy troubles, nearly constant heartburn (even after a surgery to correct it), body aches and consistent hot flashes (despite being done with menopause for over 13 years) didn't match the way I ate (not perfect, but by most standards, healthy) and how much exercise I did daily.
I started on February 26, 2024 and as of today, I have lost 33 pounds. I have also lost my sugar cravings, 95% of my hot flashes, 6 inches off my waist (plus inches off my stomach, hips, thighs, arms), gas, heartburn, tiredness and I sleep through the night consistently (I haven't for the last 16 years).
The most important aspects of the program that I feel have made the difference is the support I receive from my Wellness Coach (and the entire team in the Leesburg location) since day one, problem solving as I adapted my eating to my very busy travel schedule, encouragement when I needed it, the high quality and scientifically backed nutritional supplements, the recipes provided (I have learned to shop, cook and eat in a way that supports my health goals), and the Brain Tap program that is available to use in The Center.
The Brain Tap program is a set of 20-25 minute meditations/hypnotherapy/ coaching on a myriad of topics that I could choose from based on my current needs. It has supported me in getting my attitude, thinking, habits and values in order. I used to stress eat or eat out of boredom. There's a session for that. l used to feel self-conscious about asking for anything special or different at a restaurant. There's a session for that, too. I used to eat so others wouldn't feel bad because they were eating or because they had made food they wanted me to try. Yup, there's a session for that too. Overall, if there is any aspect of eating healthily that your mind gets in the way of, there is a session for it.
I love being trim again, especially since I don't have to starve myself or live on a treadmill to do it. Most importantly, my body feels better than it has in over 20 years and I have changed so much of how I think and what my motivations are around food and eating.
This team doesn't apply pressure so if you are thinking about it, have the consultation!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJVQf0XVkXtokROc27zICwDzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNuX1p5X3BRRRAB
reviews.text: What a great experience! In 2023, I noticed I started to gain weight, having hot flashes, and my skin got really dry. I didn’t change anything in my diet or my skin regimen. I continued to exercise regularly. In late 2023, I decided to try hormone replacement therapy. I continued to gain weight despite exercising more and eating less, I was at my highest weight since pregnancy at 135.6lbs. I was at my wits end and was thankful to find BeBalanced. When I had my initial consultation they asked me what my ideal weight goal was, I said 120lbs. I got off the HRT and started following the program on June 1st. Starred meal planning, followed their recipes, wrote everything down, took the vitamins, limited my exercise (part of the program), and the weight started coming off. The daily check-ins held me accountable but also found it rewarding to see the progress. The hot flashes stopped, my skin improved, and the weight kept coming off. When I gained or stalled in the consultant called and I would adjust what I ate for the day. By the end of the program, I was at 115lbs. This was lower than my goal. Since the end of the program, I continued to lose weight and have maintained. I’m currently at 109lbs and feel great! I never thought I would be at 120lbs let alone 109lbs in 4 months. I would highly recommend BeBalanced to anyone who is perimenopausal or menopausal.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVQf0XVkXtokROc27zICwDzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoOEpTaF93RRAB
reviews.text: My mom and I have tried every fad diet, exercise, and nutrition program out there. We've had mixed results and it never lasts. When I gained a substantial amount of weight during my recovery from neurosurgery last year, I decided to give BeBalanced a shot because I was physically incapable of exercise and needed an easy to follow nutrition program. Not only has the program helped me lose even more weight than I had planned, I have also had positive changes in my mood, skin, and digestion. The best part of this program is that it isn't difficult, it isn't complicated, and Jan and her team are with you every step of the way. I've never felt so taken care of in a weight loss program. If you're on the fence, you should give it a try. It is more worth it than I ever expected it to be.

reviews.name: places/ChIJVQf0XVkXtokROc27zICwDzE/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOMTh1S3RBRRAB
reviews.text: Before this program, I tried many different ways to lose weight, such as Keto and exercising five days a week, but I couldn’t shed the pounds. Surgery crossed my mind, but I discovered it could be dangerous and not long-lasting. I searched for years, feeling confused amidst the multitude of programs out there. Fortunately, I was lucky to find a program that really works! I embarked on my journey with BeBalanced in March of 2022. Not only did I lose 25 pounds, but my mood also stabilized, I gained more energy, and I now sleep well without interruption. A big thanks to Courtney and Jan, who were a huge help! Indeed, this program has changed my life. I wholeheartedly recommend it; it’s a way of life.

This is not a brick and mortar location. Virtual only care. This is false information. Prices: Pleasure speaking with you today. Here is how we can get you started on our TRT program.

Step 1: Get a blood test. We set this up for you with Access Labs through Lab Corp. The cost for this is $185.

Step 2: Set an appointment to see the doctor. You’ll discuss your lab results, symptoms, goals, etc. Cost $400 once per year.

Step 3: We customize a hormone replacement program for you based on budget, lab results, and goals. 3 - 4 month programs can range from $700 to $875 based on type, dosage, etc (total price for the 3-4 months).  We offer other hormone programs as well, but testosterone is the bulk of what we treat for. As per our discussion we can also do a 6 month program for $1,250.

Step 4: The pharmacy prepares your meds and ships it directly to you. We teach you how to use everything.

Looking forward to working with you on this journey. Let me know if we can schedule something for you!

reviews.text:
I never anticipated I would write a positive review about a vasectomy, but I'm here to wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Richman and the staff at Obsidian Men's Health. This isn't a clinic; it's a sanctuary for men.

From the moment I walked in, the entire experience was top-notch. The staff was professional and discreet, making the whole process feel less like a medical procedure and more like a trip to the spa.

And Dr. Richman? He was calm, collected, and instantly put me at ease. He explained every step with a level of detail that was both reassuring and slightly terrifying (in a good way). He's the kind of doctor who makes you feel like you're in the best hands possible  - because you are. The procedure itself was quick and completely painless. The whole thing was over before I could even finish my mental list of things to do after the procedure.

The recovery was a breeze. I followed the instructions, took it easy, and was back on my feet in no time. I've heard horror stories from other guys who went to other places, but my experience was the complete opposite.

So, if you're on the fence about a vasectomy, do yourself a favor and go to Obsidian Men's Health - they are the absolute best at what they do.

reviews.name: places/ChIJg59H5e1KtokR2jojyP9NppQ/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURZenBpSkF3EAE
reviews.text:
Obsidian Men's Health is the hands down best men's health practice I have every found.  I have lived all over the country and there is no comparison!
The head nurse Jessica is amazing!! She truly cares about patient care and makes you feel as though you are the only patient they have.  Amazing!!

Dr. Geib also truly cares about your care. They have an advanced knowledge of how Testosterone truly affects a man's over all health.

I never had the feeling I was just a dollar sign to them as I have another practices.  They take the time to listen to your concerns and understand how low "T" is effecting you to creat a treatment plan for you.  They do not use the medical industry standard of one treatment works for everyone because it does not.

They have always been available at all hours of the day and Dr. Geib has even called me back while he was on Vacation.  Find another Doctor that will do that.
This is not a normal doctor office, they do not except insurance and it is only for men but it is well worth the extra fee you pay for your care.

If you are in need to this type of care you need to call Karen or Jessica make an appointment!  I have not needed their other services but I know they do treat other men specific issues.

The medical industry could learn a lot from Dr. Geib, Dr. Richmam, Nurse Jessica and the staff at Obsidian.

I Highly Recommend them to any guy, even if just to check to make sure your "T" levels are good.  Call and make an appointment!
You will not regret it.

By the way I saw a poor review of this office by a woman and I think she put a review up for the wrong place.  They do not send you anywhere to have blood drawn and they Do NOT treat women.

This is my longest review ever on Google but the folks at Obsidian deserve me taking the time to do so.  After all they take a lot of time and effort to take care of me.

Give them a call and tell them Lenny said to say hello.

Good luck and stay healthy!
P.S. Thanks Google, I found them because of your search results.

reviews.text: I was scheduled for a follow-up appointment, and ended up having to wait an hour and 30 minutes to be seen. I also had a UTI, and requested a refill on the medication that had been prescribed previously in the past, from my pharmacy. My pharmacy sent the request 3 times a week previous to Intimate wellness, and never received a response. I called the nurses station to submit a refill request and asked if they were able to determine if I had a UTI, even though I was sure I had one. I was told by Jessica that urine cultures take 3 days and they wouldn’t know if I had one. I then proceeded to inquire about the medication refill for my UTI, she responded that the would place the refill for my “burning”. She then became quiet over the phone and instead of saying something of quality she said “bye”. I responded that she should have a good day. I have yet to receive the refill, and instead went to urgent care. UTI’s are a great discomfort to anyone, I believe my shortness could have contributed to the discourse between her and I. However, I serve many people and served many people with care that day, with a UTI. I also have other conditions which can make symptoms worse and this has cost me more than just a day of service to others, but also to myself. I have been with the intimate wellness clinic for some time and Dr.Nathan is the best gynecologist I have ever seen, however, his new staff should recognize the quality of care he provides and step up to this level as well; with scheduling, payment notification, testing turn over, and medication refills.

reviews.name: places/ChIJxfhsC4VxsYkRZ7NkU0wK-QI/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2psTVVGSjFhMkUwWTNKRWRUSnpRV2huZDFCaFZtYxAB
reviews.text: RIFM has provided quality care for my complex conditions (POTS, MCAS, hyper mobility) and I feel extremely lucky to be a patient of theirs.  I have been dismissed by many doctors who thought my symptoms were just anxiety.  After many years and seeing many doctors I was finally diagnosed with POTS.  I thought the hard part was over, but I was wrong.  Finding a doctor who wants to treat POTS is even harder.  Dr. Hartman doesn't shy away from hard.  I've seen Dr. Hartman for many years and he is one of the smartest doctors I've ever come across.  He listens, understands, and partners with you to come up with solutions to help manage my conditions.  He has run tests that most doctors don't that have uncovered causes of some of my symptoms.  He is constantly learning new information, thinks outside the box, and shares this knowledge with his patients.  Not only have I had such positive experiences with Dr. Hartman, but I have had positive experiences with both of his nurse practitioners Jodi Caddell and Veronica Porterfield.  Recently, Ms. Porterfield saw me for an illness and possible tick bite infection and she spent so much time with me and followed up with me when I was having issues and questions, even calling me on her personal time on a Sunday night.  Never have I felt more cared for.  I have not seen Dr. Jenski but know people who do see him and have just as amazing things to say about him.  RIFM is filled with providers who truly care about you and want to help you find solutions to feel your best.  Don't hesitate to join this practice - you won't regret it!

reviews.text:
All staff are knowledgeable and friendly.  They take time to listen to your questions and concerns.

The Dr. Hartman does a deep dive to know all of your underlying health issues and for areas that need improvement he sets out detailed, achievable goals providing information on supplements and medications if needed.

reviews.text:
Great and knowledgeable staff. Melaine is well versed in the field of BHRT and truly has her patients best interest at heart. She is now my ‘go to’ person for hormone replacement therapy for as long as I live in VA. She never once withheld any information from me about the procedure, the possible risks and benefits. Truly ca not say enough about this place. Check them out and schedule your appointment today, men if your over the age of 45, it does not hurt to have your T-levels looked at and get an expert opinion on what to do next; especially if your tired, sluggish and have unexplained weight gain.
Melaine is truly exceptional and will not ‘sugar coat’ things with you as the patient because there is no need when it come to your health and how she is going to treat you. She makes you feel like no one else matters during the time you spend with her, she is only focused on you and your needs to feeling better.
RVA Health and Wellness has my business and there are other places but nothing like the attention to detail you will receive here. Thank you Melaine for truly keeping my health and best interests as priority one during my last visit.

Thankful-
Aaron Van Dalen

I can’t recommend Rachel and Root & Ritual Functional Medicine highly enough. From my very first visit, I felt seen, heard, and truly cared for. Rachel takes a thoughtful, individualized approach to health and healing—she doesn’t just treat symptoms, she works to get to the root cause (true to the name!). Her deep knowledge of functional medicine, combined with her compassionate and grounded presence, makes every appointment feel empowering.

The practice space is warm and welcoming, and it’s clear that Rachel has created a place where whole-person wellness is the priority. She takes time to listen, explain, and collaborate, which is something you don’t always find in conventional care.

If you’re looking for a provider who will partner with you on your health journey, honor your story, and offer both science-based guidance and holistic support, Root & Ritual is the place to go.

reviews.text: You will not find a more compassionate and dedicated provider than Rachel. reviews.name: places/ChIJC74dEpOd6CwRUAv0Ddqfj58/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM5c2VLaGdBRRAB
reviews.text:
I decided to join Root and Ritual after spending years being gaslit by medical professionals. I had a few friends with autoimmune issues who found great success with functional medicine. A friend of mine locally recommended Root and Ritual. Before coming to this program I had little faith I would ever feel good again. I was tired, in chronic pain and had constant brain fog.

After extensive testing, Rachel was able to find the root cause of my symptoms and with the help of her expertise knowledge and my commitment to the program, I am feeling back to myself, clear headed, energetic and my chronic pain (headaches, migraines, stomach aches and stiffness) are gone! I am able to show up in my life again, I am back at work, keeping up in my family life, sleeping soundly and back at the gym! All things that my symptoms had stolen from me for years.

Rachel and Yana helped me understand how small changes in the way I fed myself, handle stress and move my body will help propel me forward. I am eating balanced meals, sitting down to eat, and no longer crave sugary or crunchy foods like I did before. My digestion and nutrition is better than ever and it has contributed to allowing me to have the proper energy to get through my day and thrive!

Rachel takes the time to get to know you, and your whole medical picture. She was able to go through my history and pretty quickly pinpoint where things in my charts and labs correlate. She always gets right back to me when I have a question and has fostered such a sense of community with her weekly support groups and social app.

Yana has helped me so much in learning how to feed myself to get better and thrive, all the while being conscious of my history with yoyo dieting. Her method is never about taking away, rather she focuses on adding certain foods that have made it easy to crowd my plate and I no longer crave the things that helped contribute to my poor health.

Definitely do yourself a favor and schedule a discovery call with her, you owe it to yourself to feel better.

reviews.text: I joined in March 2025 and was hoping to have a great experience and to dig deeper into my current health status and goals. I’m happy to say  I got what I was looking for and more. My doctor heard me, and together, we are finding answers to questions I’ve had for a while. I have more information now and more targeted steps to reach healthy goals. reviews.text:
My wife signed up with this company last year. She has since had MULTIPLE appointments where the physician was very late to the meeting (including one where the individual just “forgot”). She had to switch once because her doctor left the practice, which happens. She was then paired with the aforementioned person who has issues with time management skills. She asked for another doctor and did receive one, who she liked but that point we were fed up with the poor communication by the office, so wife decided to cancel her membership and find another practice.

Since then multiple messages have been left asking to not renew and to talk to the membership services to confirm. Weeks have went by with no response to any request. Today she was charged for another year of membership.

If you value your money, time, and wellness, I would stay far away from this practice.

reviews.name: places/ChIJj5_IMbzquokRzaY-sq46L3Q/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CalNIRnpiSFJoUmpKMFltWlpYMkZYYUhaNGJtYxAB
reviews.text:
I started bio identical HRT with Hormone Health and Weight Loss of Virginia about three months ago. I was having the typical menopausal symptoms of insomnia, anxiety, hot sweats, and I had low energy. I did not feel like myself at all. After I was screened to be an ideal candidate for HRT I did not hesitate because I wanted to quickly start feeling better. Almost a week later I was noticing that I was having fewer hot flashes and I was actually sleeping more. I was also starting to fall asleep a lot faster. A month in I noticed my hot flashes starting to creep in. I called them up and they had me come in to check my hormone levels. I was in range and they explained some people might need a boost to truly feel like themselves. I got a booster dose that day. That was back in September and I still feel so much better.

reviews.text:
Went here today to inquire about MIC B12 injections.  While the doctor was very nice and respectable, I was immediately hit with “you have low testosterone and you need enclomiphene.”  They didn’t even want to talk to me about providing MIC B12 injections to potentially help with my main concerns.

They checked my test and it somehow came back over 200 lower than the gamesday men’s heath test I had two weeks ago.  When I was clear that I was not buying into any testosterone therapy, Ryan switched his attitude completely and became pretty rude and stand-off like.

Additionally, Ryan immediately was trying to charge me $99 knowing that I was there from their free consultation advertisement.  I  had to remind him that everything I had done today was free.  Dr. Papariello seems great, but the vibe at this business seems off and it seems like they highly push testosterone therapy just because it’s their main money maker. Wouldn’t trust it. Gamesday Men’s Health seems more honest and sincere about patient care.

reviews.name: places/ChIJYzXsRADruokR9wX5sXQ6AEw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT214b2VFTk5jRWhZWm5WWVJUTjRRVVpRVVdRMmRrRRAB
reviews.text: I  had a very similar experience as Jonathan. Nothing about the process felt legit. After the testing the guy trying to sell the program to me felt more like a used car salesman than anyone with any type of health background. The told me my test was 240. I had it tested at my general practitioner the next week and it was at 680 which is well within normal range. Do not fall for this scam.

reviews.name: places/ChIJYzXsRADruokR9wX5sXQ6AEw/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25OMVRrOXhSRFpaV2tWUWMzWjNVbFpuY0VobWIxRRAB
reviews.text:
I’ve read over the recent low reviews … and I’m actually very familiar with the process of going through a trt clinic as the last one that was a telehealth subscription was definitely not great ( zero communication until it was time to pay a bill ). This place was definitely different they were upfront  with me answered my questions  ( which I had a few ) and definitely gave me the experience I was looking for from a local clinic …. For those recent reviews giving the low ratings makes me feel that they aren’t familiar with the long term commitment trt truly is to get the results you want .  There were zero hidden fees. And they assured me that everything was included in the price I signed up for .. and honestly the prices are absolutely competitive and you have a local office to address concerns face to face instead of texting a clinic or emailing. And waiting for a response that may or may not come in a timely manner.  It’s hard to put a price on peace of mind .. and to any that’s looking for reliable service start locally with actual
Clinics  and take your time to get all the info you need to make an informed decision about your health .   And a big thank you to Ryan and Dr grimes for helping me out last Saturday!

reviews.name: places/ChIJiwDtZrvsuokRpiJSuwIa8MY/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ3eFBheHVnRRAB
reviews.text:

The reception and assistant were both incredibly nice. However, I paid $500 for the initial appointment and never spoke to an actual health care professional.

Save your $500 initial visit payment for another more ethical provider.
